context: The government has just announced a new ______ on education reform. (act)
The company decided to place an ______ in the local newspaper to attract more customers. (advertise)
Many companies spend a lot of money on online ______ to promote their products. (advertise)
The story was written so ______ that it felt like a tale from thousands of years ago. (ancient)
If you ______ a lost wallet, you should try to return it to the owner as soon as possible. (find)
The head teacher asked the new ______ to prepare the meeting room for the parents. (assist)
The main ______ of the new amusement park is the giant roller coaster. (attract)
We need to buy some new ______ for our school laboratory. (battery)
After losing some weight, his old jeans looked even ______ than before, so he decided to buy a new pair. (baggy)
Many modern devices, such as smartphones and laptops, require rechargeable ______ to function properly. (battery)
The old man's hands were thin and ______, showing his age clearly. (bone)
Due to the heavy rain, the school announced the ______ of the outdoor sports meeting. (cancel)
The bank teller usually ______ all the checks before the end of the business day. (cash)
The weather in spring can change ______, so it's wise to carry an umbrella with you. (changeable)
The blue shirt is only $15, but the red one is even ______ than that. (cheap)
The children sang ______ as they walked through the park on the sunny morning. (cheerful)
The teacher's explanation of the grammar rule only ______ the students even more. (confuse)
In the horror movie, the zombies looked even ______ after the special effects were added. (dead)
The company has already ______ with the urgent issue, so we can focus on other tasks now. (deal)
The silence in the old house was so complete and ______ that it made everyone feel uneasy. (death)
The Christmas tree looked very beautiful with colorful ______. (decorate)
The earthquake caused great ______ to the city, leaving many buildings in ruins. (destroy)
The archaeologists have already ______ several ancient artifacts from this historical site. (dig)

The scientist's latest ______ of a new species in the rainforest amazed the world. (discover)
The school organized a charity event and encouraged everyone to make a ______ to help children in need. (donate)
The teacher looked at the student's messy homework ______ before asking him to explain. (doubtful)
The weather changed in a very ______ way, from sunny to stormy in just minutes. (sudden)
In Chinese history, there were many powerful ______ that ruled the country for hundreds of years. (dynasty)
The sun rises in the ______ part of the country much earlier than in the west. (east)
The government is trying to find an ______ solution to reduce the cost of living for families. (economy)

Nowadays, many people prefer to pay for their purchases ______ rather than using cash. (electronic)
The final ______ will cover all the topics we have learned this semester. (exam)
My little brother was very ______ when he got the gift. (excite)
We didn't ______ such a heavy rain, so we got completely wet on our way home. (expect)

To manage your budget more ______, you should keep a record of daily expenses. (financial)
My brother always ______ his homework before dinner, which is a good habit. (finish)

The manager answered the reporter's question ______, avoiding any direct commitment. (guard)
Reading before bed is one of the best ______ that helps many people relax and sleep better. (habit)
After the exhibition, the artist's paintings were ______ on the walls of the museum for everyone to admire. (display)

Although she is only twelve, she can already manage her daily tasks quite ______. (independent)
As a famous online ______, she has the power to change people's shopping habits. (influence)
______ driving is the main cause of car accidents. (care)

The teacher explained the complex theory ______, making it easy for everyone to understand. (interest)
People have ______ opinions about this topic. (differ)

The company is facing some ______ problems. (finance)

This is a very ______ building in our city. (history)

After a long ______, they finally reached an agreement. (argue)

After reading the whole story, we can draw a ______ that the main character learned an important lesson. (conclude)
The strong ______ between the two cities helps people travel easily. (connect)
After much ______, they decided to accept the invitation. (consider)

The ______ performance at the school festival was so beautiful that everyone applauded loudly. (dance)
